candidate.rationale: Canonical HLF reaction. N-chloroamine cyclizes to a pyrrolidine via intramolecular C-H amination under acidic conditions.
candidate.collision_avoidance_note: Avoids Barton-like motifs (e.g., thiohydroxamates, peroxides, hv) and decarboxylative halogenation. Simple N-haloamine substrate.
